hidden_defects.condition: paper ledger rollup could carry a portfolio snapshot from a different supported paper scope after hash recomputation
hidden_defects.impact: dashboard portfolio truth could show a mismatched exchange/market/session balance
hidden_defects.fix: rollup validator now requires portfolio scope to match the rollup scope exactly

hidden_defects.condition: filled_order_count could be changed independently from the portfolio positions after hash recomputation
hidden_defects.impact: operator could see inconsistent positions/PnL vs execution count
hidden_defects.fix: rollup validator now checks filled count, position count, and latest ledger head requirements

hidden_defects.condition: rollup artifact paths could be mutated outside the UPBIT/KRW_SPOT/PAPER ledger namespace
hidden_defects.impact: dashboard/evidence could reference live or cross-mode artifacts
hidden_defects.fix: rollup validator now blocks artifact path namespace escape
